summary: Iteration 144 - Comprehensive E2E Test for Konekt B2B Platform. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: Checkout 2-column layout (Payment Method + Payment Confirmation side-by-side), payment confirmation checkbox required, admin orders 7-column table, partner notification bell in top-right, account activation page. All login flows work (customer, admin, vendor, sales).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data. vendor-demo-001 profile exists with products=approved, services=pending. Global 20% margin rule exists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: 1) Checkout 2-column layout with Payment Method + Payment Confirmation side-by-side on desktop, 2) Payment confirmation checkbox required to submit order, 3) Admin orders page has 7-column compact table (Date, Order#, Customer, Payer, Total, Payment, Fulfillment), 4) Payments queue has separate Customer and Payer columns, 5) Partner portal has notification bell in top-right topbar, 6) Account activation page shows error for invalid/missing token, 7) All login flows work, 8) Margin engine calculates 20% correctly (1000 → 1200), 9) Service quote auto-applies margin, 10) Quote acceptance creates invoice with phased payment terms, 11) Vendor orders exclude unreleased statuses and don't expose selling_price/margin, 12) Payment release policy check-release works correctly.

F1_checkout_2_column_layout.details: Payment Method and Payment Confirmation sections are side-by-side on desktop (grid md:grid-cols-2). Bank transfer selected by default with bank details shown.

F2_payment_confirmation_required.details: Submit button disabled when checkbox unchecked (shows 'Confirm Payment to Submit'). Enabled after checking checkbox (shows 'Submit Order').

F3_admin_orders_7_column_table.details: Admin orders page shows compact table with 7 columns: Date, Order#, Customer, Payer, Total, Payment, Fulfillment.

F4_payments_queue_customer_payer_separat.details: Payments queue table has separate Customer and Payer columns (lines 87-88, 100-101 in PaymentsQueuePage.jsx).

F5_partner_notification_bell.details: Notification bell is in PartnerAccountTopbar (top-right), visible in partner portal.

F6_all_login_flows.details: Customer, Admin, Vendor (via /api/partner-auth/login), and Sales logins all work correctly.

F7_guest_order_submission.details: POST /api/guest/orders creates order correctly with order_number returned.

F8_margin_engine_20_percent.details: POST /api/admin/margin-rules/calculate with base_cost=1000 returns selling_price=1200 (20% margin).

F9_service_quote_auto_margin.details: POST /api/sales/service-quotes with vendor_cost=1000 returns selling_price=1200, margin_applied_automatically=true.

F10_quote_acceptance_creates_invoice.details: POST /api/sales/service-quotes/{id}/accept creates invoice with payment_terms containing at least 2 phases.

F11_vendor_orders_visibility.details: GET /api/vendor/orders excludes unreleased statuses (pending_payment, under_review, etc). Items only show vendor_price, not selling_price or margin.

F12_payment_release_policy.details: POST /api/admin/payment-release-policies/check-release returns can_release:true for full payment, can_release:false for partial.

F13_vendor_capability_check.details: GET /api/admin/vendor-capabilities/{id}/can-create returns allowed:true for approved capabilities, allowed:false for pending.

F14_account_activation.details: Full activation flow works: create invite → validate token → activate with password → login. Invalid token returns 400.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending is MOCKED - logged to email_logs collection, not actually dispatched. Requires Resend integration for production.
